zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben於大約0950年出生在義大利拉其羅馬時，他的父親Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben32歲，母親Judith von Marchtal27歲。他於0988年與Gerberge de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1003年5月4日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben was born about 0950, in Roma, Lazio, Italy, his father, Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben, was 32 and his mother, Judith von Marchtal, was 27. He married Gerberge de Bourgogne in 0988. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 May 1003, in Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben est né environ 0950, à Rome, Lazio, Italie, son père, Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Judith von Marchtal, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Gerberge de Bourgogne en 0988. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1003, à Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben um 0950 in Roma, Lazio, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben 32 und seine Mutter Judith von Marchtal 27. Er hat 0988 Gerberge de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1003 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Heiliges Römisches Reich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben è nato il circa 0950 nel Roma, Lazio, Italia, il suo padre, Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Judith von Marchtal, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Gerberge de Bourgogne nel 0988. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1003, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben(이)가 대략 0950년 이탈리아 라지오 로마에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith von Marchtal(은)는 27세였다. 그는 0988년 Gerberge de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1003년 5월 4일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben nasceu aproximadamente 0950, em Roma, Lazio, Itália, seu pai, Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Judith von Marchtal, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Gerberge de Bourgogne em 0988. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1003, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann II. Herzog von Schwaben родился около 0950 г. в местности рома, лазио, Италия, его отцу по имени Konrad I. Herzog von Schwaben было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Judith von Marchtal, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Gerberge de Bourgogne в 0988 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 мая 1003 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 54 лет.
